narrative:
Leavittsville (precinct in Carroll County) has 560 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.9 percentage points.
